# Job And Opportunity Source Database

This database lists source websites we can use to populate the Aitomic Jobs website. The CSV is the source of truth for automation.

## Summary

- Total sources: 4813
- Added in comprehensive source expansion round 2: 53
- Round 2 exact URL duplicates skipped: 22

## Largest Source Groups

- Public service / civil service recruitment: 196
- Ministry of labour / employment: 196
- National universities and public research institutions: 196
- Embassies and high commissions: 196
- UN country team and UN agencies: 196
- INGO country offices: 196
- Donors, contractors and development agencies: 196
- General all-sector jobs: 196
- NGO jobs: 196
- Consultancy jobs: 196
- Research consultancy jobs: 196
- Monitoring and evaluation jobs: 196
- Climate policy jobs: 196
- Public health jobs: 196
- Education research jobs: 196
- Official government jobs search: 196
- NGO website search: 196
- LinkedIn consultant jobs: 196
- ReliefWeb country search: 196
- Impactpool country search: 196
- Remote evidence synthesis consulting: 196
- Public Employment Service: 158
- Civil Service Commission: 158
- General: 52
- Official employer: 27

## Automation Rules

- Prefer official APIs, RSS feeds, or employer career pages where possible.
- Avoid copying full job descriptions when terms are unclear; publish summaries and link to the official application page.
- De-duplicate by title, organization, country, deadline, and source URL.
- Mark posts as expired after the deadline passes.
- Keep the source URL and application URL separate.
- Treat restrictive platforms as manual research sources unless permission/API access is available.
